_comment: Sealing artifact for Phase 4.5's 20% held-out partition over the K≥100 calibration runs against the frozen canned baseline. Negative falsifier (Popper AP-5): calibrated thresholds must outperform the provisional thresholds on this held-out set (lower false-positive rate at +20% perturbation, no worse false-negative rate). Reuses the verifyHeldoutPartitionSeal mechanism from packages/benchmark/calibration/calibration-seams.ts. Fill fields below ONCE before any calibration run begins; never modify after sealing.

_fields.rng_seed: integer — frozen RNG seed used to draw the partition (commit before data collection)
_fields.partition_hash: string — sha256 hex digest over sorted-newline-joined run_ids in the held-out set
_fields.partition_size: integer — count of run_ids in the held-out set (≥ 20% of K)
_fields.sealed_at: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which the partition was sealed
